upasargachandrika.example_text: 'na hIdfSaM saMvananaM trizu lokezu vidyate dayA mEtrI ca BUtezu dAnaM ca maDurA ca vAk' (BA॰Adi॰87.12)
'hfdayAnupraveSo hi praBoH saMvananaM param' (kaTA0 34169) vaSakriyA saMvananamityamaraH
'devAnAM patnIruSatIravantu naH prAvantu nastujaye vAjasAtaye tujaye' patyajananAya cAnnasaMsananAya' (ni0 12451) annasaMsananAyAnnalABAya
'annameva vivananamannaM saMvananaM smftam' (lO0 gf0 391) vivananaM viBajanam saMvananaM saha BujyamAnaM saMSlezaRamiti devapAlaH
